title: Brodies
summary:
Brodies LLP is a prominent UK law firm, headquartered in Scotland. The firm offers legal advice to private and public sector clients both in the UK and internationally in its core business areas of corporate and commercial; energy (both renewables and oil & gas); real estate; litigation and dispute resolution; banking and financial services; employment, pensions and benefits, trust and tax, and personal and family law.
Our lawyers provide legal expertise and work with clients from our offices in Aberdeen, Edinburgh, Glasgow, Inverness, Leeds and London.
text:
Brodies LLP is a prominent UK law firm, headquartered in Scotland. The firm offers legal advice to private and public sector clients both in the UK and internationally in its core business areas of corporate and commercial; energy (both renewables and oil & gas); real estate; litigation and dispute resolution; banking and financial services; employment, pensions and benefits, trust and tax, and personal and family law.
Our lawyers provide legal expertise and work with clients from our offices in Aberdeen, Edinburgh, Glasgow, Inverness, Leeds and London.

Financial performance
Brodies LLP has reported its fifteenth consecutive year of growth, with revenue rising to £126.7 million for the financial year ending 30 April 2025—an 11% increase from £114.3 million the previous year.

Awards
Scotland Law Firm of the Year at the Who’s Who Legal Awards 2019
Legal 500 Scotland Regional Firm of the Year 2018
UK National/Regional Law Firm of the Year at the Legal Business Awards 2017
Legal Advisor of the Year at the Business Insider Deals and Dealmakers Awards 2017
UK Regional Law Firm of the Year at the Lawyer Awards 2016
UK Law Firm of the Year 2014, British Legal Awards

List of Chairs (from 2004)
2025-Present Iain Rutherford
2013-2025 Christine O'Neill KC
2004-2013 Joyce Cullen

List of Managing Partners (from 1997)
2024-Present Stephen Goldie
2018-2024 Nick Scott
1997-2018 Bill Drummond
